exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) as total_sales FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) as total_sales FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1

args.query: SELECT Id, OwnerId, EffectiveDate FROM "Order" WHERE Id LIKE '#%' OR OwnerId LIKE '#%' OR TRIM(Id) != Id OR TRIM(OwnerId) != OwnerId LIMIT 10

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, OwnerId, EffectiveDate FROM "Order" WHERE Id LIKE '#%' OR OwnerId LIKE '#%' OR TRIM(Id) != Id OR TRIM(OwnerId) != OwnerId LIMIT 10

args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId, TRIM(o.OwnerId) as CleanOwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) as total_sales FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' AND TRIM(o.OwnerId) != '' AND o.OwnerId NOT LIKE '#%' GROUP BY o.OwnerId, CleanOwnerId ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.OwnerId, TRIM(o.OwnerId) as CleanOwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) as total_sales FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' AND TRIM(o.OwnerId) != '' AND o.OwnerId NOT LIKE '#%' GROUP BY o.OwnerId, CleanOwnerId ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1

args.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as order_count FROM "Order" WHERE EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25'

exec_args.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as order_count FROM "Order" WHERE EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25'

args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) as total_sales FROM [Order] o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1
